title: Legacy Console Achievements
description: Adds back the old LCE achievements.
body:
**This was designed for use with the Legacy 4J mod/Re-Console Modpack.**

Removes the new advancements from 1.12+ and replaces them with the ones from Legacy Console Edition. The resource pack is required for it to work properly.

Some achievements are absent and they will be added later.

Known Issues:
**Diamonds to you!** can be earned by throwing a diamond to yourself.
**On a Rail** and **When Pigs Fly** are bugged and don't function.
